presence_results.note_evidence: Generalized erythematous, edematous gingiva with bleeding on gentle contact and probing. Abundant supragingival calculus ... palpable subgingival calculus, most pronounced at the lower anterior teeth and the molars.
presence_results.rationale: Inflammation, bleeding, and calculus distribution documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: findings consistent with disease confined to the gingival tissues, with sound interproximal bone support
presence_results.rationale: Gingival disease confined to gum tissue without bone loss documented.
